Package com.csl.intercom.dbapi.models

Class Connection

java.lang.Object
com.csl.intercom.dbapi.models.Connection
All Implemented Interfaces:
IScannerSerializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
HttpConnection, RemotePowershellConnection, SNMPv1Connection, SNMPv2cConnection, SNMPv3Connection, SshConnection
public abstract class Connection extends Object implements IScannerSerializable
Model representing a DB-API connection. Abstract class, concrete children are tied to the actual protocols of a connection.

  • Method Details

    • fromDbapiJson

      public static Connection fromDbapiJson(Json connectionJson, List<ConnectionProtocol> protocols)
      Parse the JSON serialization received from DB-API.
      Parameters:
      connectionJson - The serialized connection as handed by DB-API.
      Returns:
      An instance of the correct child if the parsing was successful, or null.

    • serializeForScanner

      public Json serializeForScanner()
      Serialize the connection information in a format suitable to be sent to CSL-Scan (in the ConnectionInfos field). Should be overriden by children.
      Specified by:
      serializeForScanner in interface IScannerSerializable
      Returns:
      The serialized version of the connection ready to be included in a CSL-Scan's entity.

    • isSimulated

      public Boolean isSimulated()
